name: Ameriprise Financial, Inc.
h1: Ameriprise Financial's GCC footprint in India
lede: Ameriprise Financial runs two centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Noida, covering GCC/GIC, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Ameriprise Financial office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Ameriprise Financial GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Ameriprise Financial runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Noida), covering GCC/GIC. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Executive Vice President and General Manager

about.description: Ameriprise Financial's India footprint covers Gurugram and Noida, spanning GCC/GIC. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eighteen decision-makers, in one profile.
